title: Smart Data Models - MRP BillOfMaterials
description: A Bill of Materials (BoM) defines the components, sub-assemblies and quantities required to manufacture one unit of a finished product. Each BoM has a version and a type that determines how the MRP explosion engine processes it.

type.description: NGSI-LD Entity type. Must be BillOfMaterials.

value.description: Short alphanumeric code identifying this BoM (e.g. BOM-HP-P100-v1).

bomCode.description: Unique business code for the Bill of Materials.

value.description: manufacturing: produces a stocked finished good; kitting: groups items without production; phantom: virtual assembly exploded through automatically.

bomType.description: Type of the Bill of Materials, determining how the MRP explosion engine processes it.

version.description: Version of the Bill of Materials. Multiple versions may exist for the same product.

value.description: active: used by MRP planning; draft: under review; obsolete: superseded by a newer version.

state.description: Lifecycle state of the Bill of Materials.

product.description: Reference to the finished Product that this BoM defines how to manufacture.

company.description: Reference to the Company that owns this Bill of Materials.
